name: dependency-resolver
purpose: Dependency verification and vulnerability scanning backbone for the Kimi AI Engineering Skills Ecosystem. Ensures no skill executes with missing, outdated, or vulnerable dependencies.

integrations.description: Blocks skill activation until all declared dependencies are satisfied
Feeds CVE findings into Security Auditor's merge gate and audit reports
Emits structured DEP_MISSING / DEP_CVE errors for ErrorPolicy fallback decisions

safety_rules: NEVER allow a skill to run if any dependency is missing or version-incompatible
ALWAYS check for dependency updates weekly; flag outdated packages in session reports
NEVER rely on LLM's internal knowledge for CVE identification — always query live advisory databases
ALWAYS cache CVE data locally to avoid API rate limits and enable offline operation
NEVER auto-install system-level binaries without human approval
ALWAYS include dependency check in session startup — fail fast before any code runs

IMP-4.1.finding: Zero dependency specifications across 30 claimed scripts

IMP-4.3.finding: Dependency Manager claims CVE findings with no OSV/NVD/GitHub Advisory connectivity
